# Red Dirt Tractors

> Central Louisiana's heavy iron dealership on Hwy 71 South in Alexandria, LA. Authorized dealer and service center for TYM Tractors, Mahindra, Ferris, Wacker Neuson, Load Trail, East Texas Trailers, Woods, Premier Equipment, Baumalight, and Sidewinder. Full parts, service, financing, and trade-ins on site.

## Business

- **Location:** 7547 Hwy 71 South, Alexandria, LA 71302
- **Phone:** 318-442-9010
- **Email:** reddirttractors@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 8AM–5PM, Sat 8AM–3PM, Sun Closed
- **Website:** https://reddirttractors.com

## Brands

- TYM Tractors — compact and utility tractors
- Mahindra — compact and mid-size tractors
- Ferris — commercial zero-turn mowers
- Wacker Neuson — compact construction equipment
- Load Trail — utility, dump, and equipment trailers
- East Texas Trailers — utility and livestock trailers
- Woods — rotary cutters and finishing mowers
- Premier Equipment — implements and attachments
- Baumalight — tree and post equipment
- Sidewinder — rotary cutters and mowing equipment

## Pages

- [Home](https://reddirttractors.com/)
- [Inventory](https://reddirttractors.com/inventory) — live tractor and equipment listings filterable by brand, category, price, HP, year, and condition
- [Trailers](https://reddirttractors.com/trailers) — Load Trail and East Texas trailer inventory
- [Implements](https://reddirttractors.com/implements) — attachments and implements
- [Parts & Service](https://reddirttractors.com/parts-service) — OEM parts, service scheduling, and maintenance
- [Financing](https://reddirttractors.com/financing) — financing options and payment estimator
- [Trade-In](https://reddirttractors.com/trade-in) — trade-in appraisal request form
- [Find My Tractor](https://reddirttractors.com/find-my-tractor) — guided quiz to match the right tractor to your land and job
- [About](https://reddirttractors.com/about) — dealership story and team
- [Contact](https://reddirttractors.com/contact) — directions, hours, map, and contact info
- [Reviews](https://reddirttractors.com/reviews) — customer testimonials
- [Resources](https://reddirttractors.com/resources) — buying guides and equipment education

## Resource Articles

- [25HP vs. 40HP Compact Tractor: Which Fits Your Land?](https://reddirttractors.com/resources/25hp-vs-40hp-compact-tractor)
- [Mahindra vs. TYM for Louisiana Acreage](https://reddirttractors.com/resources/mahindra-vs-tym-louisiana-acreage)
- [Section 179 for Equipment Buyers](https://reddirttractors.com/resources/section-179-equipment-buyers)

## Service Area

Alexandria, Pineville, Natchitoches, Leesville, Marksville, Ball, Tioga, and Boyce — serving Central Louisiana landowners, farmers, contractors, and commercial operators.
